title: Just Infatuation

jokes.text: How are you doodly-do doing?
jokes.setup: Geoffrey forced into clown costume for Ashley's party
jokes.punchline: Overly cutesy greeting that completely betrays his dignified British butler persona
jokes.explanation: Strong character integration - dignified Geoffrey forced into childish role creates perfect comedy contrast

jokes.text: I have never been more humiliated in my life.
jokes.setup: Geoffrey in clown costume after embarrassing performance
jokes.punchline: His deadpan British delivery of complete mortification
jokes.explanation: Geoffrey's dry British dignity makes this humiliation extra funny

jokes.text: Yo, that's just them. I'm definitely laughing at you.
jokes.setup: Someone says 'we're not laughing at you, we're laughing with you'
jokes.punchline: Will's blunt honesty cuts through the polite fiction
jokes.explanation: Perfect Will Smith character moment - cuts through politeness with street-smart directness

jokes.text: Right there.
jokes.setup: Geoffrey denies there's a stain on his clown shirt
jokes.punchline: Will points to obvious stain, presumably something embarrassing
jokes.explanation: Simple visual gag that adds to Geoffrey's clown humiliation

jokes.text: You know, I really stopped counting at 10.
jokes.setup: Ashley acting mature about birthdays having less significance
jokes.punchline: Reveals she's only 12, making her 'wisdom' hilariously premature
jokes.explanation: Excellent joke structure - Ashley's false sophistication perfectly captures preteen trying to sound adult

jokes.text: A boy!
jokes.setup: Family guessing typical birthday wishes - doll, dress, game
jokes.punchline: Ashley's unexpected answer reveals her growing up
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection setup with family's innocent guesses leading to Ashley's bombshell

jokes.text: Some would beg to differ.
jokes.setup: Ashley calls Little T 'the coolest, cutest guy in the universe'
jokes.punchline: Carlton's understated disagreement in his pretentious way
jokes.explanation: Perfect Carlton dialogue - pompous phrasing for simple disagreement

jokes.text: You're telling me. He likes all the same stuff I like.
jokes.setup: Ashley reading that Little T likes video games, cheeseburgers, basketball
jokes.punchline: Will points out these are generic things most kids like
jokes.explanation: Smart observational humor about how celebrity profiles use generic interests to seem relatable

jokes.text: How about, 'Hold the anchovies'?
jokes.setup: Ashley wondering what she'd say to Little T who hates anchovies
jokes.punchline: Carlton's literal interpretation as restaurant order
jokes.explanation: Decent wordplay connecting his dislike of anchovies to practical application

jokes.text: Yeah. It was Tootie in The Facts of Life.
jokes.setup: Will asking Carlton about his first crush
jokes.punchline: Carlton's earnest admission of crush on TV character
jokes.explanation: Perfect Carlton moment - his sheltered upbringing leads to TV character crush

jokes.text: How about, 'Hello, Tootie, I'm Fruity'?
jokes.setup: Carlton wondering what he'd say to Tootie
jokes.punchline: Will's rhyming insult playing on Carlton's eccentricity
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that calls back to Carlton's question while roasting his personality

jokes.text: Two seats.
jokes.setup: Will suggesting getting something twice as good as front row seat
jokes.punchline: Hilary's literal interpretation missing the bigger idea
jokes.explanation: Classic Hilary moment - her shallow thinking leads to missing the obvious

jokes.text: Will's condescending explanation to Hilary about getting Little T to the party
jokes.setup: Will realizes Hilary doesn't understand the obvious solution
jokes.punchline: His slow, patronizing explanation like she's a child
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the Hilary stupidity bit, with Will's exasperation building comedically as he spells it out.

jokes.text: Something beginning to gel here?
jokes.setup: Will laying out obvious connection between Ashley's crush and birthday party
jokes.punchline: His patient but sarcastic guidance of the slow family
jokes.explanation: Good character work - Will as the street-smart voice of reason among the clueless rich family

jokes.text: Yeah? Well, if he's not here 15 minutes ago, that's his butt.
jokes.setup: Hilary explaining celebrities are fashionably late
jokes.punchline: Will's time paradox threat that doesn't quite make sense
jokes.explanation: Fun wordplay with Will's impatience creating impossible time demand

jokes.text: We are going to play a new game. It's called Clean Up After Your Spoiled Little Selves.
jokes.setup: Geoffrey as 'Tidy the Clown' at children's party
jokes.punchline: His bitter game title revealing his true feelings
jokes.explanation: Excellent character comedy - Geoffrey's resentment bleeding through his clown persona

jokes.text: Yeah, like that'll be happening. Yeah, man, who invited the old guy?
jokes.setup: Will trying to get kids to dance
jokes.punchline: Kids rejecting Will and calling him old
jokes.explanation: Good reversal - Will trying to be cool but getting dismissed by actual kids

jokes.text: My brother, you want to take this outside?
jokes.setup: Kid calls Will old guy
jokes.punchline: Will threatening to fight a child
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation - Will's ego can't handle being dissed by a kid

jokes.text: I wish I was never born.
jokes.setup: Carlton starting magic act as 'the great Carltoni'
jokes.punchline: Ashley's mortification at her embarrassing family
jokes.explanation: Relatable teenage mortification at family embarrassing her in front of friends

jokes.text: Listen, sorry I'm late, but I was just at Goldie's house... and Goldie and Chevy and Mel were there.
jokes.setup: Agent arriving at party
jokes.punchline: Casual name-dropping of major celebrities by first name only
jokes.explanation: Typical Hollywood agent behavior - casual celebrity name-dropping to impress

jokes.text: You made a pretty good thud when you hit the ground.
jokes.setup: Ashley saying she didn't make a sound when she fainted
jokes.punchline: Little T's gentle correction about the sound she made
jokes.explanation: Sweet moment - Little T being funny but not mean about Ashley's fainting

jokes.text: Did I really? God, I can't even faint right.
jokes.setup: Learning she made a thud when fainting
jokes.punchline: Ashley's self-criticism about her fainting technique
jokes.explanation: Good self-deprecating humor - Ashley's perfectionist streak extends even to embarrassing moments

jokes.text: Come to think of it... most of my embarrassing moments involve me hitting the floor.
jokes.setup: Ashley sharing embarrassing story about falling on stage
jokes.punchline: Her realization about her pattern of floor-related mishaps
jokes.explanation: Nice callback connecting her current fainting to past clumsiness

jokes.text: Yeah, but still, do I look okay?
jokes.setup: Being told it's not even her date, it's Ashley's
jokes.punchline: Hilary still focused on her own appearance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Hilary moment - her narcissism makes everything about her appearance

jokes.text: You know, sigh like that. You make me feel like Benji.
jokes.setup: Family members sighing over her first date
jokes.punchline: Comparing herself to the famous movie dog
jokes.explanation: Clever comparison - being treated like a cute pet rather than a person

jokes.text: No, Mom. Let's do it again. I wasn't happy with what I did.
jokes.setup: Mom wanting to film Ashley's entrance again
jokes.punchline: Hilary critiquing her own background performance
jokes.explanation: Classic Hilary - treating Ashley's moment like her own performance

jokes.text: The kid is not only aggressive, but inaccurate... and that's a dangerous combination.
jokes.setup: Will's theory about Little T's kissing intentions
jokes.punchline: Treating missed kiss like military threat assessment
jokes.explanation: Excellent absurdist logic - applying military strategy to teenage romance

jokes.text: Considering you still have the mind of a 13-year-old boy.
jokes.setup: Will claiming to know what goes on in 13-year-old boys' minds
jokes.punchline: Aunt Viv's burn about Will's mental age
jokes.explanation: Good setup and payoff - Aunt Viv gets perfect comeback on Will's overconfidence

jokes.text: When I was 13, I harbored some pretty impure thoughts about Tootie.
jokes.setup: Discussion of 13-year-old boys' thoughts
jokes.punchline: Carlton's confession about his TV character crush
jokes.explanation: Good callback that adds new uncomfortable detail to Carlton's TV character obsession

jokes.text: When they came to me, they were just Duran. I added the second Duran, and bang-o!
jokes.setup: Agent claiming to represent Duran Duran
jokes.punchline: Taking credit for adding the second 'Duran' to the band name
jokes.explanation: Great absurdist claim - agent taking credit for obviously false contribution to famous band

jokes.text: When he's on tour, he's gotta beat the chicks away with a stick. Wish I had a piece of that action.
jokes.setup: Parents thinking Little T is innocent on his first date
jokes.punchline: Agent revealing Little T's actual romantic experience
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable revelation that shifts parents' perception of the 'innocent' date

jokes.text: Follow them. - Out.
jokes.setup: Will suggesting they follow the kids
jokes.punchline: Uncle Phil's immediate and firm rejection
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between Will's impulsiveness and Uncle Phil's attempt at restraint

jokes.text: So they changed the title, and bang-o!
jokes.setup: Agent claiming he suggested Pretty Woman title change
jokes.punchline: Another ridiculous Hollywood claim with his signature 'bang-o!'
jokes.explanation: Callback establishing the agent's pattern of taking credit for major Hollywood successes

jokes.text: That's the same arm I used when I was 13.
jokes.setup: Seeing Little T put his arm around Ashley
jokes.punchline: Carlton's oddly specific reference to his own technique
jokes.explanation: Funny Carlton observation - his clinical approach to teenage romance moves

jokes.text: Uncle Phil got hungry, so he sent us to pick up a dozen pizzas.
jokes.setup: Ashley asking why Will and Carlton are at the pizza place
jokes.punchline: Will's obvious lie about Uncle Phil's appetite
jokes.explanation: Decent excuse that plays on Uncle Phil's known love of food while being obviously false

jokes.text: It's doing a weird kind of bird's nest thing. You might wanna get a hairbrush and fix it.
jokes.setup: Will claiming Ashley's hair looks bad
jokes.punchline: Getting her away so he can interrogate Little T
jokes.explanation: Standard misdirection tactic to separate the couple for interrogation

jokes.text: That's my mom.
jokes.setup: Will showing magazine photo accusing Little T of dating a 'bimbo'
jokes.punchline: Revelation that the woman is his mother
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection payoff - Will's detective work backfires embarrassingly

jokes.text: Did you believe my agent? Man, he lies about everything.
jokes.setup: Will asking about agent's claims of romantic experience
jokes.punchline: Little T revealing his agent is a liar
jokes.explanation: Good callback that reframes the agent's claims and reveals Little T's innocence

jokes.text: He told me I could have a career in singing.
jokes.setup: Saying his agent lies about everything
jokes.punchline: Implying his own singing career is based on agent's lies
jokes.explanation: Self-deprecating humor that's surprisingly mature and funny from the young star

jokes.text: I knew that. I just brought Carlton down 'cause I had to prove it to him.
jokes.setup: Learning Little T is innocent and this is his first date too
jokes.punchline: Will pretending he knew all along to save face
jokes.explanation: Classic Will move - can't admit he was wrong so blames Carlton instead

jokes.text: Carlton, I looked at my hair and it was fine. If you two don't mind, I'd like to continue with my date alone.
jokes.setup: Ashley discovering Will's hair excuse was fake
jokes.punchline: Her polite but firm dismissal of the meddling cousins
jokes.explanation: Ashley shows maturity by calling out the obvious deception and asserting independence

jokes.text: I'd like a written copy of that report.
jokes.setup: Hilary saying she wants to hear all the date details
jokes.punchline: Uncle Phil wanting official documentation of the date
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation of parental overprotectiveness to bureaucratic levels

jokes.text: I'm never gonna like anybody you bring home.
jokes.setup: Philip having tender moment with Ashley about her date
jokes.punchline: His blunt confession about future boyfriends
jokes.explanation: Sweet and funny moment of paternal honesty about inevitable future conflicts

jokes.text: 'cause when you're 21, you can appreciate these things more.
jokes.setup: Will saying Ashley's second date will be better
jokes.punchline: Revealing he wants her to wait 9 years for next date
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation - Will's overprotectiveness wants to pause Ashley's dating life for nearly a decade

jokes.text: I know you're busy. That's why I made it for then.
jokes.setup: Will saying he's busy next Saturday when Ashley has second date
jokes.punchline: Ashley revealing she scheduled it specifically when he's unavailable
jokes.explanation: Excellent payoff - Ashley shows she's learned to outmaneuver Will's interference

jokes.text: I'd like to hit her in the head with Roget's Thesaurus
jokes.setup: Carlton trying to rap about not getting into Miss Berkley's chorus
jokes.punchline: His violence reference using an intellectual weapon
jokes.explanation: Perfect Carlton rap line - even his threats are nerdy and intellectual

jokes.text: Carlton's terrible rhyme: 'I'd like to hit her in the head with Roget's Thesaurus'
jokes.setup: Will trying to teach Carlton to rap with rhyming
jokes.punchline: Carlton's overly intellectual and violent rhyme attempt
jokes.explanation: Perfect Carlton character moment - his attempt at street rap includes academic references and formal language. Brilliantly incongruous and quotable.

jokes.text: Get a load of me and my rapping cousin
jokes.setup: Carlton attempting to rap
jokes.punchline: His proud declaration despite being terrible at rapping
jokes.explanation: Carlton's oblivious confidence in his rapping ability despite obvious lack of skill

tmdb_overview: R&B singer Tevin Campbell plays teen idol Little T, who surprises Ashley on her birthday with a special song and an invitation for a date.
